zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Giffard於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德時，她的父親John Giffard44歲，母親Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury44歲。她於1296年與Fulk Strange在英國史洛普爾其其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年1月23日之前在英國英格蘭賀福爾布拉可麥，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾布拉可麥。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Giffard于大约1275年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德时，她的父亲John Giffard44岁，母亲Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury44岁。她于1296年与Fulk Strange在英国史洛普爾其其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年1月23日之前在英国英格兰賀福爾布拉可麥，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾布拉可麥。

nameMeanings.name: Giffard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: (i) relationship name from the Continental Germanic personal name Gifard. (ii) nickname, perhaps sometimes from Old French giffard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Guiver
meanings: English: (i) nickname, apparently from Middle English giver ‘giver, donor, bestower’. (ii) variant of Giffard with voicing of /f/ to /v/ and loss of final -d.

variants.name: Gafford
meanings: English (southeastern): assimilated form of Gatford, a name of various origins. In Sussex and Surrey it is perhaps a variant of the habitational name Catford from a place so called in Somerset. Gatford is also from the habitational names Gateford (in Worksop, Nottinghamshire) or Gateforth (near Selby, Yorkshire), both formed with Old English gāt ‘goat’ + ford ‘ford’, influenced by Old Norse geit ‘goat’.

Probably also an altered form of German Gaffert: habitational name from Gaffert near Köslin, Brandenburg, or from a personal name formed with Middle High German gate ‘fellow, companion’. The surname Gaffert is very rare in Germany.

English: perhaps an altered form of Gatewood , an occupational name for a ‘goatherd’ (Middle English gate-werde, Old English gātweard) or for a ‘gate keeper’ (Middle English gateward, Old English ʒeatweard, dialect gātward).

variants.name: Gifford
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Giffard was born about 1275, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Giffard, was 44 and her mother, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, was 44. She married Fulk Strange in 1296, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 23 January 1323, in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Giffard est née environ 1275, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Giffard, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Fulk Strange en 1296, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 23 janvier 1323, à Blakemere, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Blakemere, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Giffard um 1275 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Giffard 44 und ihre Mutter Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury 44. Sie hat 1296 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England Fulk Strange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 23. Januar 1323 in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Giffard è nata il circa 1275 nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Giffard, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Fulk Strange nel 1296, nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 23 gennaio 1323, nel Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Giffardが約1275年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドで生まれた時，父John Giffardは44歳，母Maud Clifford Countess of Salisburyは44歳であった。1296年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチでFulk Strangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年1月23日以前にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブラケメアで死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブラケメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Giffard(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Giffard(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1296년 영국 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 Fulk Strange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 1월 23일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 블레이케머에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 블레이케머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Giffard nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Giffard, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Fulk Strange em 1296, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 23 de janeiro de 1323, em Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Giffard родилась около 1275 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Giffard было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulk Strange в 1296 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 23 январь 1323 г. в местности блеикемир, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности блеикемир, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1275–Bef 23 January 1323: e tusa o le 1275–a'e le'I oo le 23 Ianuari 1323

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Giffard nació aproximadamente 1275, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Giffard, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Maud Clifford Countess of Salisbury, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Fulk Strange en 1296, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 23 de enero de 1323, en Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
